plugins.name: elternportal
plugins.description: Access Eltern-Portal school data: substitution plans, parent letters, bulletin board, and calendar events via MCP server.

plugins.name: aws-ses-mailer
plugins.description: Send emails via AWS SES. Supports plain text, HTML, CC/BCC, reply-to, display name, file attachments, and dry-run mode.

plugins.name: podcast-skill
plugins.description: Generate a 2-person AI podcast from written content using configurable personas and ElevenLabs voice synthesis.

plugins.name: ai-espresso
plugins.description: Generate a strategic morning AI news briefing covering the last 24 hours, saved as a self-contained HTML file.

plugins.name: pushover
plugins.description: Send urgent push notifications to your phone via Pushover. Use when immediate reaction is needed.

plugins.name: transistor
plugins.description: Publish and manage podcast episodes on Transistor.fm. Upload audio, create/update/list/get episodes, publish or schedule, update show metadata, and fetch analytics.

plugins.name: claude-code-release-podcast
plugins.description: Generate and publish a podcast episode for every Claude Code release. Fetches the CHANGELOG, researches each feature (WHY/WHAT/HOW), chains podcast-skill for audio, and publishes to Transistor.fm. Tracks processed releases in TRACKER.md.

plugins.name: daily-ai-espresso-podcast
plugins.description: Turn the daily AI Espresso morning briefing into a published 15-minute podcast episode. Reads the latest AI Espresso HTML, chains podcast-skill for audio with per-story chapter markers, and publishes to the Daily AI Espresso show on Transistor.fm.
